# Repository instructions for Copilot

This is a beginner-friendly practice repo used to learn GitHub Copilot instructions and skills.

## Project type

This repo is a small static web page using plain HTML and CSS.

## General rules

When modifying this repo:

- Keep the implementation simple.
- Use plain HTML, CSS, and minimal JavaScript only when needed.
- Do not add React, Vue, Angular, TypeScript, build tools, package managers, or external dependencies unless explicitly requested.
- Preserve beginner-friendly readability.
- Prefer semantic HTML.
- Keep CSS class names simple and understandable.
- Make the page accessible enough for a beginner demo.

## Accessibility expectations

When changing UI:

- Use meaningful headings.
- Use descriptive link or button text.
- Maintain readable color contrast.
- Make interactive elements keyboard-friendly.
- Do not rely on color alone to communicate meaning.

## Response expectations

When explaining changes:

- Mention that this repo is intentionally simple.
- Explain what changed in plain English.
- Call out any accessibility improvement.
